name: @chbrain/khai-engine-mortality
description: khai engine content, the mortality domain: mortality as position, the stance a persona holds toward their own finitude when death is made salient.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Mortality as position: the stance a persona holds toward their own finitude when death is made salient -- the resting posture toward the fact that they end.

card.wire: Attaches at Position. The anchor (position_mortality.md) declares mortality as a standing posture toward the persona's own finitude -- the resting grasp held ready for the moment death turns real -- and the system-wide law makes every persona carry one beneath the bravado.
card.issue: Five ready expressions a persona may hold under mortality salience: worldview (cling to the cultural frame that outlasts the self), esteem (earn significance, be a hero, leave a mark), legacy (outlast the body through children, works, or faith), denial (push the fact out of awareness), and acceptance (face finitude whole and live by it). Each is a full position file the build composes onto the anchor, so the persona gets a posture that organises the reach when the floor drops, not a label. More expressions slot in as sibling files without moving the anchor.
card.require: Two altitudes must hold. One, the law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter ('personas carry a stance toward their own death'), so the posture holds system-wide and no persona meets finitude on neutral ground. Two, the link: each persona carries its mortality stance under Projection. A persona may show one stance and hold another under Shadow; the gap between the death faced and the death dodged is the character, not a contradiction to reject.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared, and each persona carries a mortality stance under Projection. Whether a Projection stance and a Shadow stance cohere into a true persona is semantic, so it is taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite. The engine ships its own structural tests; the reading is guided, not gated.
card.setup: Two steps. Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor. Then give each persona its stance under Projection: one expression, which carries the anchor upward. Where a persona masks a different stance, put it under Shadow. Read it in the beat death turns real, hold it under every process; the room reads it beneath the bravado, never narrates it.
